results.title: ROSEN, A LONGSTANDING FIRM, Encourages Helen of Troy Limited Investors to Secure Counsel Before Important Deadline in Securities Class Action – HELE
results.description: NEW YORK, June 15, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- WHY: Rosen Law Firm, a global investor rights law firm, announces a class action lawsuit on behalf of purchasers of common stock of Helen of Troy Limited (NASDAQ: HELE) between April 24, 2024 and October 8, 2025, inclusive (the “Class Period”). A class action lawsuit has already been filed. If you wish to serve as lead plaintiff, you must move the Court no later than August 3, 2026.

results.description: Gold prices in Pakistan recorded a massive surge on Monday, mirroring the upward trend in the international market. results.title: Explained: Why Japan's Nikkei soared to lifetime high even after BOJ hiked interest rates to 31-year high
results.description: Japan's Nikkei index surged past 70,000 for the first time as the Bank of Japan raised its short-term policy rate to 1%, the highest in 31 years. The central bank's gradual tightening, coupled with diminished Middle East conflict risks, supported equities. Simultaneously, an Iran-US peace deal boosted sentiment, leading to gains in India's Sensex and Nifty.
